gold: Tôi không cần. Tại vì tôi không biết in nên là tôi muốn được hỗ trợ để in ra giấy.
predicted: Ơ ơ tôi không cần nhưng mà tôi cần tại vì tôi không có biết in rằng là tôi muốn ơ được hỗ trợ để in cái giấy.

sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'nhưng' (but) introduces a contrast that was not present in the original sentence, which can change the meaning and coherence of the sentence.
The insertion of 'có' (have) is a minor grammatical addition that does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence.
'nên' (so/therefore) and 'rằng' (that) serve different grammatical functions; this substitution changes the structure but the overall intent is still understandable.
'ra giấy' (print out paper) vs. 'cái giấy' (the paper) changes the object from the action of printing to the paper itself, which slightly alters the meaning but does not derail the intent.
